info.description: A clickable gear marker inside a Studio Room, matching ROOMS[].markers[] in studio-vr's roomsData.js.

slug.description: Matches marker.id, which is also expected to match the linked Course Topic's slug, e.g. "speaker", "mixing-console".

yaw.description: Captured in studio-vr using the app's own "P" hotspot-placement mode.

narrationAudio.description: Spatialized narration clip played when the hotspot is selected, matches marker.audio. Stored via the S3 upload provider.

topic.description: The Course Topic this hotspot opens into (matches marker.id to TOPICS[].id in the current frontend data).
